texto: It is hard to make the boat go as fast as you want to. The enemy of course, is resistance of the water, as you have to displace the amount of water equal to the weight of the men and equipment, but that very water is what supports you and that very enemy is your friend. So is life: the very problems you must overcome also support you and make you stronger in overcoming them.
explicacao: Orientação direta de George Yeoman Pocock sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “It is hard to make the boat go as fast as you want to. The enemy of course, is resistance of the …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amizade, boat, boys-in-the-boat, útil em momentos de termino e boys-in-the-boat.
